query:
-- Florida @ Iowa (DB has florida=away, iowa=home — reversed from AN's Iowa @ Florida)
-- AN DK NJ: Iowa +10.5 / Florida -10.5, total 145.5, ML: Iowa +440 / Florida -600
-- Since DB has florida=away: awayBookSpread = -10.5 (florida favored), homeBookSpread = +10.5
-- awayML = -600 (florida), homeML = +440 (iowa)
-- Start: 3:10 PM PST
UPDATE games SET 
  startTimeEst = '03:10 PM',
  awayBookSpread = -10.5, homeBookSpread = 10.5,
  bookTotal = 145.5,
  awayML = -600, homeML = 440
WHERE id = 1890028;

-- Arizona @ Utah State (DB has arizona=away, utah_st=home — reversed from AN's Utah State @ Arizona)
-- AN DK NJ: Utah State +11.5 / Arizona -11.5, total 154.5, ML: Utah State +550 / Arizona -800
-- Since DB has arizona=away: awayBookSpread = -11.5 (arizona favored), homeBookSpread = +11.5
-- awayML = -800 (arizona), homeML = +550 (utah state)
-- Start: 3:50 PM PST
UPDATE games SET 
  startTimeEst = '03:50 PM',
  awayBookSpread = -11.5, homeBookSpread = 11.5,
  bookTotal = 154.5,
  awayML = -800, homeML = 550
WHERE id = 1890032;
